description: Firewall protective value: a RogueAgent (requests 8x-equity orders every tick) on an adverse market, contained by the firewall vs unprotected.
finding: The firewall capped 23 oversized orders, bounding the misbehaving agent to $4,222 final equity; unprotected, the same agent fell to $-4,120. The firewall saved $8,341 on a $10,000 account.
